conservative.name: Advanced Parry
conservative.requirements: Strength 4+, melee weapon equipped, Weapon Skill mastery

bane.description: Special: If the incoming attack misses, the attacker suffers 1 wound per (minimum 1, maximum 4). Advanced Parry replaces Improved Parry in your action deck and counts as Parry for all effects that reference it

challenge.description: Effect: After you have been declared the target of a Melee Attack or Ranged Attack, add two recharge tokens to this card to add to the action's dice pool
